calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-06-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: D. Neville.
Arnold Evje II, Esq. for for Plaintiff: M. Amin, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Ann Thompson
EXH.1 - Three-day Notice to pay or quit dtd 10-03-06--------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 48 6th St., #28, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $1,209.98
Costs $195.00, for a total of $1,404.98
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD WALTER EVJE, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF M AMIN
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ANN THOMPSON. (MS. THOMPSON SHOWED UP AT 2:30PM IN DEPT 206)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR: TRIAL DATE REMAINS
